MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_PEN.title: Hiro's Pen
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_PEN.description: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Justice.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_PEN.flavor: A pen Hiro often used in middle school. It should have already been given to Yuki.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCH_FACTOR.title: Witch Factor
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCH_FACTOR.descript: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 15 Witchification. Whenever you play a Skill or Power, lose 10 Witchification.
MANOSABA_LIN_RELIC_WITCH_FACTOR.flavor: When the witch factor becomes too active, people lose reason and turn into dangerous monster-like beings.
